candidates.why: Operating revenue component; but there is an explicit total revenue line which should be primary for REVT.
Revenue component but appears mostly empty; secondary to total revenue line.
Major operating revenue component; secondary priority after explicit total revenue line.
Revenue descriptor but appears empty; use only as lower-priority fallback.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be primary REVT choice given presence of Total Revenue.
Explicit total revenue/top-line measure summarizing operating revenues; best primary REVT mapping.
Adjusts lease-related revenue; not the main top-line but could be considered ancillary revenue; lower priority.
Financial income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT while a proper revenue line exists.
Equity/comprehensive income attribution, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling Interest
candidates.why: Equity/comprehensive income attribution, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Liability, not the revenue flow itself.

candidates.row_label: Deferred gains on sales of vessels
candidates.why: Liability/equity component related to gains, not recurring revenue.

variables.notes: Mapped REVT primarily to the explicit 'Total Revenue' line, with main revenue components as lower-priority fallbacks to handle potential label changes over time.

candidates.why: Non-recurring and non-business; not direct cost of sales.
Direct voyage-related costs in a shipping company; best proxy for cost of sales/COGS.
Ongoing vessel operating costs, also close to COGS but somewhat broader; secondary candidate.
Profit-sharing costs; may be part of operating costs but less central than voyage expenses for COGS.
Direct cost of leased-in vessels used in operations; could be part of COGS but likely smaller component than voyage expenses.
Overhead (SG&A), not COGS.
General rental/overhead; not core COGS.
Lease-related; not primary COGS measure.
Net operating result, includes revenue and costs; too aggregated and not a pure COGS line.
Financing-related; not COGS.
Other non-operating/aggregated items; not COGS.
Supplemental disclosure of rental expense, not main COGS.
Asset; not an income statement cost flow.
Liability; not the COGS line itself.
Accrued/voyage-related liability; related to COGS conceptually but balance sheet, not P&L.
Accrued ship operating expenses on balance sheet; not the P&L COGS line itself.
Accrued SG&A on balance sheet; not COGS.

variables.notes: Selected 'Voyage expenses and commissions' as the primary direct cost of generating voyage revenues, which best represents COGS for a shipping company. Other operating costs are either more overhead-like or supplemental.

candidates.why: Operating gain line, not an SG&A expense component; should be excluded from SG&A mapping.
Direct operating costs of vessels, better treated as COGS rather than SG&A; excluded per rule to omit direct production costs from SG&A.
Classic SG&A/overhead expense line; best match for XSGA components.
Balance sheet accrual of operating expenses; not itself an SG&A P&L component line.
Balance sheet accrual of admin expenses; we prefer the income statement expense line for SG&A mapping.

variables.notes: Mapped SG&A to the explicit income statement line 'Administrative expenses' and intentionally excluded ship operating expenses as they represent direct operating/production costs rather than overhead.
No research and development expense line (or close synonym) appears in the provided income statement or balance sheet. XRD is therefore treated as zero.

candidates.row_label: Share of results from associated company and gain on equity interest
candidates.why: Equity-accounted income, not interest expense; should not be primary XINT mapping.
Main income statement interest expense line; best primary mapping for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on finance lease liabilities; a component of total interest expense and useful as a fallback if the main line is missing.

candidates.row_label: Net income attributable to non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Attribution of profit, not interest.
Comprehensive income attribution, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not interest.
Descriptor for attribution, not an interest expense line.
Supplemental interest expense disclosure; useful as lower-priority fallback for XINT.
Capitalized interest, not period expense; generally excluded from interest expense mapping for PROF.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; can serve as an additional fallback if other interest lines are unavailable.
Accrued interest expense on balance sheet; not the primary P&L flow but may be a last-resort fallback.
Equity component, not interest.
Equity component, not interest.
Adjustment to lease obligations; not the reported interest expense line itself.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Primary XINT mapping is to the main income statement 'Interest expense' line. Additional related interest lines (including balancing value and finance lease interest) are provided as lower-priority fallbacks to handle label changes or data gaps over time. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest expense - Balancing value

candidates.row_label: Share of results from associated company and gain on equity interest
candidates.why: Income from associates, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the Company
candidates.why: Equity attributable to parent/owners, explicitly excluding non-controlling interests; ideal BE measure per instructions.
Includes both parent and non-controlling interests; only used if no parent-only equity line exists, which is not the case here.
Balance sheet total; not pure equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the Company

variables.notes: Book equity (BE) is mapped to 'Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the Company', which correctly excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting when MIB is added separately.

candidates.row_label: Net income attributable to non-controlling interest
candidates.why: P&L attribution of income; indicates NCI exists but the balance sheet line is more appropriate for MIB stock.
Comprehensive income attribution; not the equity stock itself.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution; not the equity stock itself.
Descriptor fragment; not a standalone line item for MIB.
Balance sheet stock of non-controlling interests; best match for MIB.
Duplicate label for non-controlling interest; either would work but using one avoids double counting.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet 'Non-controlling interest' line, representing the stock of minority interest equity. The duplicate 'Minority Interest' line is not additionally selected to avoid double counting.
